login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your outreach console.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start composing your presence.
signup.statement: Built for people who ship in public.

landing.title: Compose your presence, on a schedule.
landing.subtitle: Connect LinkedIn, learn from your best posts, and let the console draft what comes next.

accounts.title: Connected accounts
accounts.subtitle: Connect LinkedIn, then bring in your post history.
accounts.empty: No accounts yet — connect LinkedIn to begin.
accounts.importHelp: Upload the Shares.csv from your LinkedIn data export. Open <link>Get a copy of your data</link>, tick “Posts”, request the archive, then upload the Shares.csv it contains.
accounts.addPostsHelp: LinkedIn no longer offers the Shares.csv export. Paste your existing posts here — content plus an optional share link — so the AI can learn your voice and what performs.
accounts.addPostsDesc: Paste each post's text. A share link is optional — it lets us pull in that post's engagement later.
accounts.engagementHint: Engagement is optional — it sharpens what the AI learns about what performs.
accounts.parseHelp: On a post: ··· menu → “Embed this post”, then paste the snippet here. We pull the text, reactions, comments and image automatically.
accounts.parsePlaceholder: Paste the embed iframe snippet or the embed URL…
accounts.parseNoUrn: Couldn't find a LinkedIn post in that — paste the embed snippet or URL.
accounts.parseFailed: Couldn't fetch that post. Paste the text manually below.
accounts.settingsProfileGoHint: Interview, analysis and fine-tuning for this account.
accounts.settingsNoProfile: No creator profile is assigned to this account yet.
accounts.metricsNote: Lifetime totals. Post text comes from the CSV import.
accounts.rateLimited: Rate-limited by LinkedIn — showing last cached values.
accounts.enrichNone: Import your Shares.csv first — posts need a LinkedIn URN to enrich.
accounts.postsEmpty: No posts yet — import your Shares.csv.

profile.profilesSubtitle: Build and manage the voice profiles the AI uses to write for your accounts.
profile.emptyLibrary: No profiles yet — create one to teach the AI your voice.
profile.title: Creator profile
profile.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we'll draft a brand brief you can edit.
profile.emptyNoAccount: Connect a LinkedIn account first to build your creator profile.
profile.analyzeNoPosts: No posts to analyze yet — add your past posts first.
profile.fineTuneDesc: I'll suggest small, concrete traits from your posts. Keep the ones that are you, drop the ones that aren't — the profile sharpens each round.
profile.fineTuneReview: Nice — apply your choices, then I'll suggest more.
profile.fineTuneEmpty: No new suggestions right now. Add posts or run analysis for more.
profile.assignHint: Each account uses exactly one profile — checking an account here moves it off any other profile.
profile.noAccounts: Connect a LinkedIn account first to assign this profile.
profile.analyzeHint: Analyze an assigned account's posts to see insights here.
profile.psCanvasPlaceholder: Your profile canvas will appear here as the conversation builds it.
profile.pcExamplesEmpty: Example posts will appear here as we go.

resources.title: Resources
resources.imagesSubtitle: Photos of you or your brand. Mark the ones the AI should steer generated post images with.
resources.knowledgeSubtitle: Reference documents that will ground post generation in a later step.
resources.imagesEmpty: Upload photos of yourself or brand imagery — the AI uses them to steer generated post images.
resources.knowledgeEmpty: Upload PDFs (norms, laws, guidelines). They're stored now; grounded post generation activates in a later step.
resources.toggleRefFailed: Couldn't update the reference. Please try again.

studio.title: Studio
studio.subtitle: Draft a post, generate an image, and save it for later.
studio.emptyNoAccount: Connect a LinkedIn account first to use the studio.
studio.postPlaceholder: Your post will appear here — write or edit freely.
studio.generatingImage: Generating image… this can take a minute
studio.draftsEmpty: No drafts yet — generate a post above and save it.
studio.noProfile: Build your creator profile first — we need it to draft in your voice.
studio.createPrompt: What should this post be about?
studio.createPromptPlaceholder: e.g. a post about our new compliance dashboard and why it matters for GRC teams…
studio.createHint: The AI drafts it on the canvas when the studio opens. Leave empty and it drafts from your profile.
studio.createDefaultPrompt: Draft a LinkedIn post in my voice based on my profile.
studio.deleteBody: This permanently removes the draft and its chat. This can't be undone.
studio.notFound: This draft could not be found.
studio.chatHint: Tell me what to write — "a post about our launch", "make the hook punchier", "add an image". I'll draft it on the canvas.
studio.chatPlaceholder: Ask for a post or a change…
studio.chatEmpty: No messages yet — ask for a post to get started.
studio.sourcesTitle: Based on {count, plural, =1 {1 source} other {# sources}}

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like an email address.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.network: Can't reach the server. Is the API running?

feed.title: Content-Radar
feed.subtitle: Track the sources you follow and turn fresh articles into posts.
feed.addSourceDesc: Paste an RSS or Atom feed URL. We'll pull in its latest articles.
feed.sourceUnreachable: Couldn't reach that feed. Check the URL and try again.
feed.readerEmptyDesc: Select a story on the left to read it here.
feed.pickAccountDesc: Which account should this draft belong to?
feed.postPrompt: Write my own LinkedIn post inspired by this article — my take, not a recap. Title: "{title}". Core: {excerpt}. Source: {url}
feed.emptyNoSources: No sources yet. Add an RSS feed to start tracking articles.
feed.emptyNoItems: Nothing here yet — add a source or refresh to pull in articles.

dashboard.subtitle: Your creator cockpit — accounts, content and what's working.
dashboard.noDrafts: No drafts yet — start one in the Studio.
dashboard.noProfile: No creator profile yet. Build one so the AI writes in your voice.
dashboard.profileNoInsights: Add your past posts and run analysis to see what performs.
